name: Hillary Clinton
abstract: Hillary Diane Rodham Clinton (née Rodham; born October 26, 1947) is an American politician, lawyer, and diplomat. She was the 67th United States secretary of state in the administration of Barack Obama from 2009 to 2013, a U.S.

about_quotes.evidence: Oh, god, who’s the woman whose husband was President? ... Clinton. Hillary Clinton. Let’s say he voted for Hillary Clinton.
